gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T2.A2 = 'Jesenik'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id)
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T4.A2 = 'Jesenik'
  AND T1.gender = 'F';
question: How many clients opened their accounts in Jesenik branch were women?
